product.title: Redeyed Sentinel
product.description: Adds the Redeyed Sentinel CAPTCHA (self-hosted CAPTCHA + IP reputation) to the registration form. Free and inert until the Site Key and Secret Key are configured.

plugin.title: Redeyed Sentinel: render widget
Redeyed Sentinel: verify token

phrasetype.name: Redeyed Sentinel
phrasetype.phrase: Public Sentinel site key from Redeyed Lab &rarr; Sentinel &rarr; Sites. Safe to expose in HTML; it renders the CAPTCHA widget on the registration form.

Per-site Secret Key from Redeyed Lab &rarr; Sentinel &rarr; Sites (shown only once). Used server-side only to authenticate verification and never printed to the page. While this is empty, Sentinel is inert and registration is never blocked.
Base URL of the Sentinel service. Defaults to https://redeyed.com. Only change this if you run a self-hosted Sentinel instance.
